artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Cambridge is shaping AI for everyone… We want to generate new ways of thinking about the role of AI. The next wave of AI must deliver real-world impact… With the strength of our community, we're creating AI that works for science, citizens and society. [Find out more](https://www.ai.cam.ac.uk/)
artifacts.notes: Marketing/landing page for ai@cam research initiative. No policy, guidance, or regulatory content. Links to ai.cam.ac.uk which is also research-focused.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: These pages provide guidance about good academic practice, including plagiarism and how to avoid it.
artifacts.notes: Original AI-specific URL redirects to generic plagiarism overview page. The destination page has no AI-specific content. The AI-specific page was likely removed or restructured. The generic destination is a separate candidate (cam-plagiarism-academic-misconduct).

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Page not found: we need time to evolve
artifacts.notes: URL returns 404. Page does not exist.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Page not found… The requested page "/guides/artificial-intelligence" could not be found.
artifacts.notes: UIS AI guide URL returns 404. No AI-specific guidance found on UIS site.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Human Resources | University of Cambridge… Salary scales, myHR Readiness, Job Opportunities, Forms, Policies & Procedures
artifacts.notes: GenAI HR page URL redirects to generic HR homepage. No AI/GenAI content on destination. No dedicated HR GenAI guidance found.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: ai@cam is the University of Cambridge's mission to drive a new wave of AI innovation that delivers public value… Join our ai@cam community
artifacts.notes: ai@cam research initiative homepage. Showcases research events, sprint programmes, community sign-up. No policy or guidance content.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Policy on recordings of teaching materials/lectures, and other teaching, learning and assessment activities
artifacts.notes: General recording/lecture capture policy. No AI or GenAI content. Referenced by information compliance guidance but not AI-specific.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Cyber security awareness: training, guides and videos… Incident reporting… Antivirus software… Compliance monitoring and management
artifacts.notes: Generic IT security page. No AI-specific security guidance. Contains information security policies link but those are also generic (acceptable use, systems management, email policy, data protection).
Old URL path redirects to BLS homepage. Content has moved to /artificial-intelligence-and-education/using-generative-ai. Duplicate of verified candidate cam-bl-using-generative-ai.
Old URL path redirects to BLS homepage. Content has moved to /artificial-intelligence-and-education/generative-ai-and-assessment. Duplicate of verified candidate cam-bl-generative-ai-assessment.
